yesterdayAnalysis: Tuesday executed a solid double day with a 4.1-mile run at Run Club (TSS 43, HR 146 — excellent aerobic effort) followed by a 1.7-mile pool swim (TSS 28). todayRecommendation: Complete today's scheduled 50-minute bike + 20-minute brick run at easy effort. Focus on smooth pedaling rhythm and controlled HR on the bike (target NP under 150w), then execute the brick transition with relaxed running form to continue building race-day neural patterns without stressing the hip.

keyInsight: Sleep quality has rebounded strongly with back-to-back 81-82 scores after mid-week dips, positioning you well for the quality work remaining this week and Saturday's long ride.
